recommendations.title: Marvellous
recommendations.overview: Dramatisation of the true story of the life of Neil "Nello" Baldwin.  Born with a mild learning disability but without the burden of social embarrassment & how his inexhaustible ability to see the good in any situation overcame any stigma society

recommendations.title: The Union
recommendations.overview: A New Jersey construction worker goes from regular guy to aspiring spy when his long-lost high school sweetheart recruits him for an espionage mission.

recommendations.title: The Child in Time
recommendations.overview: A successful writer of children's books, Stephen Lewis is confronted with the unthinkable—he loses his only child, four-year-old Kate, in a supermarket. In one horrifying moment that replays itself over the years that follow, Stephen realises his dau

recommendations.title: Our Folks
recommendations.overview: Two quarreling peasant families, who were forced to leave their lands after the war, are settled by accident on two neighboring farms.

recommendations.title: The Devil All the Time
recommendations.overview: In Knockemstiff, Ohio and its neighboring backwoods, sinister characters converge around young Arvin Russell as he fights the evil forces that threaten him and his family.

recommendations.title: Summer with Monika
recommendations.overview: One summer day, two teens begin a reckless affair and abandon their families to be with one another.

recommendations.title: Notes on a Scandal
recommendations.overview: A veteran high school teacher befriends a younger art teacher, who is having an affair with one of her 15-year-old students. However, her intentions with this new "friend" also go well beyond platonic friendship.

recommendations.title: Still Out of My League
recommendations.overview: After breaking up with her dreamboat, Marta finds love with an artist. But life throws a few twists into the mix for the ailing woman and her friends.

recommendations.title: You Can Count on Me
recommendations.overview: A single mother's life is thrown into turmoil after her struggling, rarely-seen younger brother returns to town.

recommendations.title: Another 9 1/2 Weeks
recommendations.overview: Despondent at losing his lover, a man wanders the streets of Paris and has an affair with her kinky friend.
